description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' cards.
User pauses to examine the available tasks on the Explore page.
User clicks the filter icon in the top right corner of the screen.
The 'Filter Opportunities' modal slides up from the bottom of the screen.
User reviews the various filter categories such as Task Type, Duration, and Pay Rate.
User clicks the 'X' button to dismiss the filter modal.
The filter modal closes, returning the view to the main Explore screen.
